concept: Shape a survival experience where you maintain an autonomous submarine habitat in oceanic trenches where water pressure warps the fundamental laws of physics. Manage critical systems as unpredictable pressure anomalies introduce temporary localized rule changes like reversed thermodynamics or altered material properties. Venture outside in specialized pressure suits to harvest resources from deep-sea ecosystems that have adapted to exploit physics inconsistencies. Investigate mysterious signals emanating from even deeper regions where the boundary between physical law and possibility appears to be dissolving entirely.
